title: Better Fletching Table
description: Creates a use for the fletching table block
body:
### ❕This mod is under development. Future versions may include more features, and you may experience bugs.



## 🎯Better Fletching Tables

Better Fletching Tables is a mod that creates a use for the fletching table. It allows for the creation of arrows, spectral arrows, tipped arrows, and later updates will include the creation of special arrows, like the echo arrow.



## ✨ Recipies and Usage

Instead of the 4 usual arrows you get from crafting, you now get 8. Use the normal arrow crafting recipe for spectral arrows, but add glowstone dust. One dust plus 1 of every normal arrow material gives you 8 spectral arrows. But for tipped arrows, 8 of every normal arrow material plus one lingering potion gives you a stack of tipped arrows for the corresponding potion.



## ❤️Thank you for choosing this mod!
